config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update data on row selection. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		#Check if user is logged or not if not then navigate to login page
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsLoggedIn
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.print("New Session")
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
	#End of try block		
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='OPCode Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Configuration/OPCode')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup  -> OPCode')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: Add/Update data on row selection. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
		selectedRow = self.props.selection.selectedRow
		pydata = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(self.props.data)
		countWI = 0
		if(len(pydata) > 0):
			for rows in range(len(pydata)):
				if(selectedRow == rows):
					Id = pydata[rows]['OPCodeId']
					ModelId= pydata[rows]['ModelId']
					Model= pydata[rows]['Model']
					AreaId= pydata[rows]['AreaId']
					Area= pydata[rows]['Area']
					LineId= pydata[rows]['LineId']
					Line= pydata[rows]['Line']
					WorkStationId= pydata[rows]['WorkStationId']
					WorkStation= pydata[rows]['WorkStation']
					OPDefinitionId= pydata[rows]['OPDefinitionId']
					OPDefinition= pydata[rows]['OPDefinition']
					WITypeId= pydata[rows]['WITypeId']
					WIType= pydata[rows]['WIType']
					OPCode= pydata[rows]['OPCode']
					desc = pydata[rows]['Description']
					AttributeText = pydata[rows]['AttributeText']	
					ImageName = pydata[rows]['ImageName']	
					ImagePath = pydata[rows]['ImagePath']
					isActive = pydata[rows]['IsActive']
					ToolId = pydata[rows]['ToolId']
					ProgramId = pydata[rows]['ProgramId']
					MarriagePart = pydata[rows]['MarriagePart']
					system.perspective.print("IsMinMaxReq:%s"%str(pydata[rows]['IsMinMaxReq']))
#					IsMinMaxReq = -1
#					if pydata[rows]['IsMinMaxReq'] != '' or str(pydata[rows]['IsMinMaxReq']).lower() != 'None'.lower():
					if str(pydata[rows]['IsMinMaxReq']).upper() == 'True'.upper():
						IsMinMaxReq = 1
					else:
						IsMinMaxReq = 0
					MaxVal = pydata[rows]['MaxVal']
					MinVal = pydata[rows]['MinVal']
					Part = pydata[rows]['Part']
					BOMId = pydata[rows]['BOMId']
					Quantity = pydata[rows]['TorqueQuantity']
#					system.perspective.print({'UnitId':UnitId,'UnitName':str(name),'UnitDescription':str(desc),'UnitLevel':levelId,'AttachedTo':attachedId,'isActive':isActive,'IPAddress':ipAddress,'WorkStationTypeId':WorkStationTypeId})
					break	

		headerLabel = "Edit"
		messageType = 'OPCodePanel'
		payload = {'UnitId':int(Id),'headerLabel':headerLabel,'ModelId':int(ModelId),'AreaId':int(AreaId),'LineId':int(LineId),
		'WorkStationId':int(WorkStationId),'OPDefinitionId':int(OPDefinitionId),'WITypeId':int(WITypeId),'OPCode':int(OPCode),
		'Description':desc,'AttributeText':AttributeText,'ImageName':ImageName,'ImagePath':ImagePath,'isActive':int(isActive),
		'ToolId':ToolId,'ProgramId':ProgramId,'IsMinMaxReq':IsMinMaxReq,'MaxVal':MaxVal,'MinVal':MinVal,'Part':Part,'BOMId':BOMId,
		'MarriagePart':MarriagePart,'Quantity':Quantity}
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page')

		folderName = 'Project_VECV/OPCode'
		colName = 'OPCodeId'
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1,"id":int(Id),"folder":str(folderName),"colName":str(colName)}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")


	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='OPCode Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/OPCodeConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/TabContainer/cntTable/tblEquip')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print(str(description) + '  ' + str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
	"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: make table refersh and reset in panel. 
	"""
	try:
		self.refreshBinding("props.data")
		self.session.custom.type='Add'
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'OPCodePanel'  
		Action = "Save"		 			
		payload = {'UnitId':'','headerLabel':headerLabel,'ModelId':-1,'AreaId':-1,'LineId':-1,
				'WorkStationId':-1,'OPDefinitionId':-1,'WITypeId':-1,'OPCode':'',
				'Description':'','AttributeText':'','ImageName':'','ImagePath':'','isActive':int(1),
				'ToolId':'','ProgramId':'','IsMinMaxReq':-1,'MaxVal':'','MinVal':'',"Action":Action,'Quantity':'','Part':-1,'BOMId':-1}
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page')
		
	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	except: 
	#start of except block 
		screenName ='OPCode Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/OPCode')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root->tblOPCode->MessageHandler')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

# implement your handler here
	self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 12/05/2024
		Purpose: remove selection on double click and make reset in panel. 
	"""
	try:
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblOpCode").props.selection.selectedRow = -1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("tblOpCode").props.selection.selectedColumn = ''
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")  
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightP')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'OPCodePanel'
		payload = {'UnitId':'','headerLabel':headerLabel,'ModelId':-1,'AreaId':-1,'LineId':-1,
						'WorkStationId':-1,'OPDefinitionId':-1,'WITypeId':-1,'OPCode':'',
						'Description':'','AttributeText':'','ImageName':'','ImagePath':'','isActive':int(1),
						'ToolId':'','ProgramId':'','IsMinMaxReq':-1,'MaxVal':'','MinVal':'',"Action":Action,'Part':-1,'BOMId':-1}		 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	except:
		screenName ='OPCodeConfiguration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Master Configuration/OPCodeConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:root  -> OPCodeConfiguration')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)
